title: DarkInventory
description: Keep your inventory items after death
body:
Get a server today and play with your friends! Click HERE or below banner & Use Code GAMERPOTION to get 25 off!


 

DarkInventory


A simple keep inventory on mod. Never lose your items! |  View Changelog

Server side is supported. You can install this on the server and not need to have it installed on the client.

Created by the same authors who made DarkRPG (for a full RPG experience, get the DarkRPG modpack and enjoy quests and rpg gameplay)

 

Features

(Your vanilla experience will be further enhanced thanks to these features) 

In a vanilla game, every time you die you drop your items and can lose them. With this mod you will never lose your items after death. Just install and log into singleplayer or a server with this mod installed and the Keep Inventory gamerule will automatically be turned on for you

To turn off in-game just use the command `/gamerule keepInventory false` (note: this only works in singleplayer will re-enable if you log out and back in again) 

Curse of Binding on items such as armor can also be removed with this mod. Simply use the command `/trigger clearcob` and follow the on-screen instructions (note trinket items will be lost so remove your other trinkets before clicking the link in chat) (Fabric only)

This mod supports Vanity Slots and Trinkets (Fabric only) 

 

Permission - Feel free to use in your modpacks.

 

Click the banner below to get your server today! or go to BisectHosting.com  and make sure to use the code 'gamerpotion' to get your 25% off.
